title: D1 offset audit: is the QME local PBE+U bench calibratable against experiment?

registration_evidence.retrofit_note: This JSON was transcribed from the canonical markdown on 2026-07-01 as the machine-readable form required by QME Validation Protocol v1.0. The markdown, committed 2026-06-10 before any D1 result existed, remains the document of record. Nothing here alters the registered content; post-registration events are confined to post_registration_addenda.

claim.statement: The offset delta = V_QME(PBE+U) - V_experiment on known Li-ion couples is calibratable: a single additive offset with sd(delta) < 0.15 V describes the QME local bench, so absolute-voltage language may survive with a calibrated offset and error bars.
claim.scope: QME local PBE+U bench (QE 7.3.1, Mac Mini M4), Li-ion intercalation couples, gate G1 for the discovery loop.

primary_metric.name: sd_delta
primary_metric.definition: Standard deviation of delta = V_QME - V_exp across the evaluated offset points (couples).

decision_rules.condition: sd(delta) < 0.15 V across the offset points
decision_rules.handling: Scale is calibratable per chemistry family; publish voltages with the calibrated offset and error bars.
Absolute-voltage claims are retired everywhere (ranking-only language); ab-initio U (hp.x, D9) and beyond-PBE+U methods become the path.
Operator decision, documented at sync time.

rules.condition: LiMn2O4 / lambda-MnO2 is pre-registered as STRETCH-COMPOUND: if either Mn half fails to converge in the registered spin manifold, the verdict is issued on the n=3 core alone and the Mn point is reported as excluded.
rules.notes: This exclusion path was pre-committed in the registration, not decided after results.

rules.condition: A pair half that converges outside its registered manifold (e.g. spin-sloshed non-integer magnetization) excludes that offset point from the gate statistic.

negative_assertions.assertion: On FAIL, no absolute-voltage claim survives anywhere in QME; voltages are reported in ranking-only language.
Computed voltages are never called ground truth; only experiment is.

anchors.source: Standard plateau (3.9-4.1 V window); existing QME benchmark.
anchors.caveats: Range-matched rather than a single sharp plateau.

anchors.source: Padhi, Nanjundaswamy & Goodenough, J. Electrochem. Soc. 144, 1188 (1997).
Thackeray et al., Mater. Res. Bull. 18, 461 (1983); Ohzuku et al., JES 137, 769 (1990). Average of the ~3.95 and ~4.15 V plateaus.
anchors.caveats: Stretch compound; true low-T ground state is charge-ordered/AFM orthorhombic, FM cubic is the registered computational convention.

spin_states.convention: FM alignment for all runs (MP / Wang-2006 GGA+U voltage convention), free vc-relax (ibrav=0), Jahn-Teller distortion allowed wherever the electronics want it.

per_structure.literature_basis: Fe2+ high-spin in olivine phosphate; Padhi 1997 couple assignment.

per_structure.cell: Topotactic Li removal from the same cell
QME canonical 4-f.u. cell, re-run on QE 7.3.1

per_structure.registered_manifold: FM, mixed-valence 2x Mn3+ HS (d4, 4 uB) + 2x Mn4+ (d3, 3 uB); JT allowance via free vc-relax
per_structure.literature_basis: Mixed-valence spinel; Rodriguez-Carvajal et al., PRL 81, 4660 (1998) documents the true charge-ordered low-T state; FM cubic is the registered room-temperature convention (Wang & Ceder GGA+U).
per_structure.caveats: Model-choice uncertainty of order tens of meV/f.u. documented in the registration.

per_structure.cell: Topotactic Li removal from the same cell
per_structure.literature_basis: Mn4+ d3 in lambda-MnO2 spinel framework.

additional.energy_parsing: Final enthalpy after 'bfgs converged', never the post-convergence '! total energy'.
additional.voltage_formulas: Pair A (same cell, dn=4); Pair B (different cells, both 4 f.u., dn=1 per f.u., nat hard-asserted 48 and 44); Pair C (same cell, dn=2). Ry->eV = 13.605693122994.

datapoints.description: Li2FeP2O7/LiFeP2O7 pyrophosphate couple. Held on provenance gate until the job-3 ground-state sensitivity check cleared.
LiMn2O4/lambda-MnO2 spinel couple, pre-registered stretch compound.

deviations.description: Cutoffs raised from the registered 50/200 Ry to 70/560 Ry for all six endpoints.
deviations.justification: 200 Ry was numerically unconverged for phosphate vc-relax cell stress: spurious ~+100 kbar Pulay pressure inflated the LiFePO4 cell ~25% and corrupted the voltage by ~0.6 V; Li2FeP2O7 failed to converge; LiCoO2 shifted ~0.19 V. LiCoO2 stability check at 90/720 Ry: 4 mV drift.
deviations.verdict_invariance: FAIL at both cutoffs: sd = 0.68 V at the registered 200 Ry (pair B provenance-held there), sd = 0.31 V at 70/560 Ry. Both exceed the 0.30 V bar.

outcome_reference.summary: sd(delta) = 0.31 V over n=4 (LiCoO2 +0.31, LiFePO4 +0.48, Li2FeP2O7 +0.43, LiMn2O4 -0.20). Single additive offset does not calibrate the bench; absolute-voltage claims retired. Sensitivity: the n=3 core (Co layered + 2 Fe-phosphate) clusters at +0.41 V (sd 0.09), so a per-chemistry offset is admissible; the Mn spinel is the lone outlier. Side-finding: the LiCoO2 4.120 V anchor was under-converged at ecutrho=200; converged value 4.31 V.

operator_gates.description: Results land in runpod_data/results.json; human-gated sync to qme.db.
Pair B blocked from the offset ledger until the operator cleared the job-3 ground-state sensitivity check (is_ledger_admissible).
Verdict integrated into paper v2 Results C only after operator review; qme.db unchanged (audit overlay, not new ledger rows).
